name: MAI-1-preview
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) foundation model, total/active params undisclosed
note: Microsoft AI's first foundation model trained end-to-end in-house (pre+post-trained on ~15,000 H100s); debuted at rank #13 on the LMArena Text leaderboard (per LMArena's own Aug 2025 announcement), the first entry from a new provider into the Top 15. Feeds Copilot text use cases; also offered to trusted testers via API. Context window/param count undisclosed; ctxK is an unconfirmed estimate, not sourced.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real and released Aug 28 2025 via microsoft.ai/news/two-new-in-house-models (fetched directly): MoE architecture and ~15,000 H100 pre/post-training confirmed on that page. LMArena debut independently confirmed as rank #13 via LMArena's own Aug 2025 announcement (tightens the record's vague '~rank 13-15' to an exact, sourced number). API availability to trusted testers confirmed via independent 2026 coverage. ctxK (128) remains an unverified estimate — no primary source discloses a context window for this model; left as-is per the record's own honest caveat since the schema requires a numeric value. No result rows were present to verify.
